name: Motech Industries Inc.
summary: Motech Industries Inc. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells solar products and services in Taiwan and internationally. It provides photovoltaic (PV) cells, PV modules, PV power systems, and PV inverters. The company was formerly known as Meter International Corporation. Motech Industries Inc. was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
